# RESQ-LINK | AI-Powered Emergency Response System

## Project Overview
A high-performance, mobile-first emergency SOS and incident reporting platform built with Next.js, Genkit, and Mappls (MapmyIndia).

## Tech Stack
- Framework: Next.js 15 (App Router)
- AI: Genkit (Gemini 2.5 Flash)
- Location: Mappls APIs (Routing, Distance Matrix, Nearby Search, Geocoding)
- Styling: Tailwind CSS, ShadCN UI
- Fonts: Bebas Neue (Headline), DM Sans (Body)

## Core Capabilities (AI Tools)
- `findNearbyPlaces`: Locates emergency services (hospitals, fire stations).
- `evaluateDispatchOptions`: Compares responder times via Distance Matrix.
- `getOptimalRoute`: Precise ETA and routing.
- `getAddressFromCoords`: Reverse geocoding for accuracy.
- `geocodeAddress`: Address to coordinate conversion.

## Key Files
- `src/ai/genkit.ts`: AI configuration.
- `src/ai/tools/mappls-tools.ts`: Tool definitions (MCP-style).
- `src/ai/flows/ai-driven-dispatch-status-flow.ts`: Core dispatch logic.
- `src/services/mappls.ts`: API service layer.
- `src/app/page.tsx`: Main UI entry point.
- `src/components/sos/SOSSection.tsx`: SOS activation UI.

## Environment Variables
- GOOGLE_GENAI_API_KEY
- MAPPLS_API_KEY
